title: 日本ダービーの後に・完走！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You were so close, Tickezo! But that was a great
race!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It was so awesome! Good luck next time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I... I made it all the way to the Derby... But I
failed.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: AAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it! This is the wooorst!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race of Winning Ticket's dreams, the
Japanese Derby, ends not with a bang, but with a
whimper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she can't stop crying, and I try to
console her on the way home.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...
choice_data_list: Have you calmed down a bit?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I feel a little better. Thanks, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always been quick to tears, but I've never
seen her this sad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But just as I'm wondering how I can cheer her up...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I know what those two would say if they were
here. They'd tell me, "You can't cry forever."

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Now that I've gotten that out of my
system, I've realized something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Even though I lost, my fans said it was a great
race.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Winning... isn't the only thing that's important.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's the serious competition, the huge clash
between rivals that makes a race so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a little sniffle, Winning Ticket tries to give
me a happy smile.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it like that, I was still able to give
them an exciting race!
choice_data_list: No doubt—it was a great race!
No doubt—it was a great race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, the next goal is the Kikuka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That one has to be a great race too! I'm gonna
make sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though her dream of winning the Derby
didn't come true, Winning Ticket beams with the
satisfaction of having excited the crowd.
